testcase.name: PerformTPIWithImage

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.AndroidUIAutomator: new UiScrollable(new UiSelector().scrollable(true)).scrollIntoView(new UiSelector().textContains("Bowling La")) (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
